title: Privilege Escalation Attempt Detected
description: Detects privilege escalation attempts including SUID abuse, sudo misuse and kernel exploit indicators.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT QIDNAME(qid) as EventName, sourceIP, destinationIP, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) as LogSource, payload, starttime FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%sudo -i%' OR payload ILIKE '%sudo -s%' OR payload ILIKE '%chmod 4755%' OR payload ILIKE '%pkexec%') ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 300 SECONDS
